CraftLink is a platform that aims to con: CraftLink is a platform that aims to connect skilled craftspeople with those who need their services quickly and easily.
We believe that every skill deserves to: We believe that every skill deserves to reach those who need it, and that technology can make finding the right craftsperson easier than ever.
At CraftLink, we believe that the succes: At CraftLink, we believe that the success of any platform depends not only on technology but also on the values ​​upon which it is built. Therefore, we ensure that every experience on the platform is based on a set of principles that guide our work and define our vision for the future.
We aspire to make CraftLink the leading: We aspire to make CraftLink the leading platform that connects craft skills with real opportunities in the community, and we seek to build a digital community that brings together talented craftspeople with customers looking for reliable, high-quality services.
Our mission at CraftLink is to empower c: Our mission at CraftLink is to empower craftspeople to showcase their skills and expertise in a professional manner that helps them access new job opportunities and suitable clients, and we strive to provide an easy-to-use digital environment.

CraftLink is a digital platform designed: CraftLink is a digital platform designed to empower artisans and help customers easily find trusted services. We aim to build a reliable ecosystem where skills meet opportunity.
Whether you're a customer, artisan, or p: Whether you're a customer, artisan, or potential partner, we would love to hear from you.
CraftLink is a digital platform that con: CraftLink is a digital platform that connects skilled artisans with customers looking for trusted services such as carpentry, plumbing, electrical work, and more.
How can I register as a craftsman?: How can I register as a craftsman?
You can create an account and choose 'Jo: You can create an account and choose 'Join as a Professional'. After completing your profile and verification process, you can start receiving job requests.
Is CraftLink available in all cities?: Is CraftLink available in all cities?
Currently CraftLink is expanding across: Currently CraftLink is expanding across Egypt, starting with major cities and gradually covering more areas.
Customers can search by service category: Customers can search by service category, location, rating, and availability to find the best professional for their needs.
How does the rating system work?: How does the rating system work?
After completing a job, customers can ra: After completing a job, customers can rate and review the professional based on their experience.
Creating an account and browsing service: Creating an account and browsing services is free. Some premium features for professionals may require a subscription.
How do I report a problem?: How do I report a problem?
You can contact our support team through: You can contact our support team through the contact form or email support@craftlink.com.
How long does support take to respond?: How long does support take to respond?
Our support team usually responds within: Our support team usually responds within 24 hours during working days.
Can I cancel a service request?: Can I cancel a service request?
Yes, you can cancel a request before the: Yes, you can cancel a request before the professional confirms the booking.
Our main office is located in Mansoura,: Our main office is located in Mansoura, Dakahlia, Egypt.
Welcome to CraftLink. Your privacy is ex: Welcome to CraftLink. Your privacy is extremely important to us. This Privacy Policy explains in detail how CraftLink collects, processes, uses, stores, and protects your personal information when you access or use our website, mobile applications, and related services.
CraftLink is a platform designed to conn: CraftLink is a platform designed to connect customers with skilled artisans and service providers.In order to provide these services, certain information must be collected and processed.This document explains exactly what information we collect, why we collect it, how it is used, and what rights you have regarding your personal data.
By creating an account or using any part: By creating an account or using any part of the CraftLink platform, you acknowledge that you have read and understood this Privacy Policy and agree to the practices described in it.
In order to operate effectively and prov: In order to operate effectively and provide a reliable service, CraftLink collects different categories of information from users. The information we collect may include personal information, service-related information, technical data, and usage data.
Personal information refers to informati: Personal information refers to information that can identify an individual directly or indirectly. When users register for a CraftLink account, they may be required to provide personal details that allow us to create and manage their accounts.
This information may include the user's: This information may include the user's full name, email address, phone number, and login credentials. In some cases, users may voluntarily provide additional profile information such as profile photos, descriptions, or professional details if they are registering as artisans.
We collect this information to ensure th: We collect this information to ensure that each user account is unique, secure, and capable of interacting properly with other users on the platform.
Users who create artisan profiles may pr: Users who create artisan profiles may provide additional professional information to showcase their services. This information helps customers understand the skills and experience of artisans before requesting a service.
Examples of this information may include: Examples of this information may include service categories, work experience, service descriptions, previous work images, service areas, and availability schedules.
This data is displayed on the platform s: This data is displayed on the platform so customers can make informed decisions when selecting a service provider.
When customers submit service requests,: When customers submit service requests, CraftLink collects certain information related to the service being requested. This information may include a description of the service, images related to the job, location details, and communication messages exchanged between customers and artisans.
These details are necessary to ensure th: These details are necessary to ensure that artisans clearly understand the customer's needs and can respond appropriately to service requests.
When users access the CraftLink platform: When users access the CraftLink platform, certain technical information is automatically collected by our systems. This information helps us understand how the platform is being used and allows us to improve performance and security.
This technical data may include the user: This technical data may include the user's IP address, device type, browser type, operating system, language preferences, pages visited, session duration, and interaction patterns within the platform.
Usage data includes information about ho: Usage data includes information about how users interact with the platform. This may include actions such as browsing service categories, sending messages, creating service requests, leaving reviews, or updating profile information.
Analyzing this data helps us improve the: Analyzing this data helps us improve the user experience, optimize system performance, and identify areas where the platform can be enhanced.
CraftLink uses collected information for: CraftLink uses collected information for multiple operational, functional, and security purposes.
The primary purpose of collecting user i: The primary purpose of collecting user information is to provide the core functionality of the CraftLink platform. This includes connecting customers with artisans, enabling communication between users, and facilitating service requests.
In addition, we use user data to improve: In addition, we use user data to improve our services, enhance system performance, analyze user behavior, detect suspicious activity, and ensure compliance with applicable laws and regulations.
CraftLink may send users various types o: CraftLink may send users various types of communications related to their accounts and platform activity.
These communications may include account: These communications may include account notifications, service request updates, security alerts, password reset instructions, customer support responses, and important platform announcements.
Some communications are essential for th: Some communications are essential for the operation of the platform and cannot be disabled. However, users may have the option to manage certain non-essential notifications through their account settings.
CraftLink does not sell personal data to: CraftLink does not sell personal data to third parties. However, certain information may be shared in specific situations to ensure that the platform functions properly.
In order for services to be completed su: In order for services to be completed successfully, certain information must be shared between customers and artisans.
This may include names, service descript: This may include names, service descriptions, job locations, and communication messages related to the service request.
CraftLink may work with trusted third-pa: CraftLink may work with trusted third-party companies that help us operate the platform. These providers may assist with cloud hosting, data storage, analytics, messaging services, or payment processing.
These service providers only have access: These service providers only have access to the information necessary to perform their specific functions and are obligated to protect user data.
CraftLink takes the protection of user d: CraftLink takes the protection of user data seriously and implements multiple security measures designed to safeguard personal information.
These measures may include encrypted com: These measures may include encrypted communications, secure servers, access controls, monitoring systems, and regular security reviews.
While we strive to protect all user info: While we strive to protect all user information, it is important to understand that no online system can guarantee complete security.
CraftLink retains personal information o: CraftLink retains personal information only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this Privacy Policy.
Data may also be retained to comply with: Data may also be retained to comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, enforce agreements, or maintain platform integrity.
Users have certain rights regarding thei: Users have certain rights regarding their personal information. These rights may include the ability to access, update, correct, or request deletion of their personal data.
Users may also request information about: Users may also request information about how their data is being used and stored.
CraftLink uses cookies and similar track: CraftLink uses cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance the functionality of the platform and improve the browsing experience.
Cookies allow the platform to remember u: Cookies allow the platform to remember user preferences, analyze traffic patterns, and provide personalized experiences for returning users.
The CraftLink platform may contain links: The CraftLink platform may contain links to external websites or services that are not operated by us.
We are not responsible for the privacy p: We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these third-party services.
CraftLink services are intended for adul: CraftLink services are intended for adults and individuals who are legally able to enter into service agreements.
We do not knowingly collect personal inf: We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under the age of 18.
CraftLink may update this Privacy Policy: CraftLink may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in technology, legal requirements, or platform features.
Any updates will be published on this pa: Any updates will be published on this page with an updated revision date.
If you have any questions regarding this: If you have any questions regarding this Privacy Policy or how your information is handled, please contact our support team.
Welcome to CraftLink, a platform connect: Welcome to CraftLink, a platform connecting Instructors, Craftsmen / Trainees, and Clients. These Terms of Use explain in extreme detail the rules, responsibilities, rights, and limitations of each user type on the platform. By using CraftLink, you agree to comply fully with these Terms.
CraftLink is designed to provide a relia: CraftLink is designed to provide a reliable, secure, and professional environment by connecting the following parties:
Instructors: Individuals who create, des: Instructors: Individuals who create, design, and publish training courses on the platform to teach skills and knowledge in a structured way.
Craftsmen / Trainees: Individuals seekin: Craftsmen / Trainees: Individuals seeking to improve their practical skills by learning from instructors’ courses or by acquiring direct services.
Clients: Individuals or companies reques: Clients: Individuals or companies requesting specific practical services from trained craftsmen through the platform.
CraftLink strictly functions as an inter: CraftLink strictly functions as an intermediary platform and does not act as an employer, staffing agency, or guarantee employment outcomes. The platform only facilitates connections, communications, and transactions between parties.
All users of CraftLink are expected to a: All users of CraftLink are expected to adhere to the following responsibilities to maintain trust, fairness, and legality on the platform:
Provide accurate and complete personal a: Provide accurate and complete personal and professional information when creating accounts, including legal name, email, phone number, and any professional credentials relevant to the platform.
Maintain ethical and lawful use of the p: Maintain ethical and lawful use of the platform, avoiding any activities that violate local, national, or international laws.
Avoid posting, sharing, or transmitting: Avoid posting, sharing, or transmitting content that is harmful, offensive, discriminatory, illegal, or otherwise inappropriate.
Not attempt to access accounts, systems,: Not attempt to access accounts, systems, or content of other users without explicit permission (i.e., hacking, phishing, or exploiting system vulnerabilities).
Respect other users’ privacy and persona: Respect other users’ privacy and personal information; any misuse may result in suspension or permanent banning.
Instructors creating courses on CraftLin: Instructors creating courses on CraftLink must comply with the following:
Ensure all course content is original, a: Ensure all course content is original, authentic, and not copied from other sources unless permission is granted.
Do not publish illegal content, adult co: Do not publish illegal content, adult content, or copyrighted material without authorization.
Provide clear learning objectives, struc: Provide clear learning objectives, structured lessons, and practical examples where applicable.
Maintain professional communication with: Maintain professional communication with trainees, responding politely and promptly to questions or concerns.
Offer refunds or corrections if a course: Offer refunds or corrections if a course fails to meet platform quality standards, according to CraftLink’s review policies.
CraftLink reserves the right to remove c: CraftLink reserves the right to remove courses that violate these standards, issue warnings, or suspend instructors temporarily or permanently.
Users learning skills or purchasing cour: Users learning skills or purchasing courses must understand and agree to the following responsibilities:
Provide accurate information during regi: Provide accurate information during registration and course purchases.
Do not distribute course content outside: Do not distribute course content outside the platform or share login credentials with others.
Do not resell or redistribute any traini: Do not resell or redistribute any training videos, texts, or materials provided by instructors.
Understand that skill improvement depend: Understand that skill improvement depends on their own practice, effort, and commitment to applying knowledge learned.
Give fair feedback and ratings to instru: Give fair feedback and ratings to instructors, avoiding false or malicious reviews.
CraftLink does not guarantee personal pr: CraftLink does not guarantee personal progress or skill mastery. Users assume responsibility for their own learning outcomes.
Clients requesting services from craftsm: Clients requesting services from craftsmen agree to:
Provide detailed and accurate descriptio: Provide detailed and accurate descriptions of requested work, including project scope, deadlines, and special requirements.
Pay agreed amounts fairly, using the pla: Pay agreed amounts fairly, using the platform’s secure payment methods whenever available.
Communicate professionally, politely, an: Communicate professionally, politely, and clearly with craftsmen to avoid misunderstandings.
Avoid fraudulent requests, scams, or att: Avoid fraudulent requests, scams, or attempts to manipulate the service provider.
CraftLink is not responsible for dispute: CraftLink is not responsible for disputes arising between clients and craftsmen. However, we may intervene in cases of clear violation of policies or fraud.
Financial transactions must comply with: Financial transactions must comply with the following rules:
Users must pay the full amount for cours: Users must pay the full amount for courses or services before access is granted.
Refunds are only considered in cases whe: Refunds are only considered in cases where:
The course is defective, misleading, or: The course is defective, misleading, or incomplete
The instructor provides false informatio: The instructor provides false information or violates platform policies
The client receives a service significan: The client receives a service significantly different from the agreed terms
Partial refunds may be offered at CraftL: Partial refunds may be offered at CraftLink’s discretion after review.
All refund requests are reviewed individ: All refund requests are reviewed individually. CraftLink has the right to approve, partially approve, or deny refunds based on evidence and fairness.
All course materials, videos, texts, gra: All course materials, videos, texts, graphics, and images uploaded to CraftLink remain property of the creator or rights holder.
Users are strictly prohibited from downl: Users are strictly prohibited from downloading, copying, sharing, re-uploading, or selling content without explicit permission.
Violations of IP rights may result in pe: Violations of IP rights may result in permanent suspension, legal action, or reporting to relevant authorities.
CraftLink may use aggregated, anonymized: CraftLink may use aggregated, anonymized data for analytics, marketing, or internal reporting without identifying individual users.
Respecting copyright and intellectual pr: Respecting copyright and intellectual property is mandatory for all users.
CraftLink provides services as a facilit: CraftLink provides services as a facilitator only and does not guarantee:
Employment opportunities or job placemen: Employment opportunities or job placement for any user
Income generation from learning or servi: Income generation from learning or services
Improvement of skill levels or professio: Improvement of skill levels or professional capabilities
Accuracy, completeness, or relevance of: Accuracy, completeness, or relevance of course or service content
Satisfaction or success of any service r: Satisfaction or success of any service request
Users participate at their own risk, and: Users participate at their own risk, and CraftLink is not liable for personal or financial outcomes.
Personal losses, injuries, or damages ex: Personal losses, injuries, or damages experienced while using the platform
Financial or business-related losses fro: Financial or business-related losses from transactions on the platform
Misuse of information exchanged through: Misuse of information exchanged through the platform
Disputes between different user types (I: Disputes between different user types (Instructor, Trainee, Client)
CraftLink only provides an environment f: CraftLink only provides an environment for communication, learning, and service facilitation.
CraftLink may update these Terms of Use: CraftLink may update these Terms of Use at any time:
Changes may include new rules, modificat: Changes may include new rules, modifications, or clarifications.
Users are responsible for regularly revi: Users are responsible for regularly reviewing the Terms of Use.
Continued use of the platform after upda: Continued use of the platform after updates constitutes agreement to new terms.
CraftLink may notify users of significan: CraftLink may notify users of significant changes via email or platform notifications.
